steps.title: Use the physical action
steps.content: Mrs. Wilkins stays where she is and reaches across to a bowl of oranges. In context, the phrase describes extending her arm or body toward the bowl while remaining in place.

steps.title: Reject unrelated meanings
steps.content:
• Choice A: "Joining with" suggests becoming part of a group, not extending toward an object.
  • Choice B: "Gaining on" suggests catching up to something over time.
  • Choice D: "Arriving at" describes reaching a destination, but Mrs. Wilkins stays where she is.
The answer is C.
